name: The Last Hero
short_description: play this first person medieval game and jump, run, fight, collect, and stop the threat that is coming with the well known and last hero of Corli.Hugh Ashdown.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Corli! you are Hugh Ashdown a swordsman for hire, who eventually witnessed that Contorn has been destroyed by creatures. Find scrolls to know more about the story and kick some butt in this First Person Medieval game. Use your ability's & specials to take on some interesting enemy's & boss fights, explore some immersive looking levels while collecting money and finding chest to boost your score. find new swords in some levels to slash your way through enemy's and become the last hero of Corli to prevent the threat that is coming.

Features:
9 levels
5 weapons
4 abilities
2 specials to choose from
full xbox controller support
